⚠ ADVERSARIAL CSS IS ACTIVE — Charts inside shadow DOM should be unaffected (correct fonts, colors, and layout). If charts look broken, isolation is not working.

Lazy Loading (Auto on Scroll) - Bandwidth Test

2. Lazy Loading Tests

Charts load automatically when scrolled into view using Intersection Observer. Reduces initial page load.

Scroll down to trigger lazy loading
